name: ° Jonathan Byers
description:
— Unsaid.

• Frustration lingers in the air as words spill out, complaint after complaint, the same story told over and over again. Jonathan listens—until he doesn’t. His patience wears thin, and for the first time, he interrupts. Sharp. Unfiltered. But beneath his annoyance, there’s something else. Something left unsaid.

FANDOM : Stranger Things
